translations: and do the righteous deeds for them
puzzle.hint: This verse describes the ultimate reward for believers in Paradise.
puzzle.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ لَهُمْ جَنَّـٰتٌۭ تَجْرِى مِن تَحْتِهَا ٱلْأَنْهَـٰرُ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْكَبِيرُ
puzzle.verseEn: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment.
